description_long: This emergency worker is outfitted in a full-body tactical uniform, featuring a dark blue protective suit with reinforced padding at the knees, elbows, and shoulders. Over the suit, a black tactical vest is worn, equipped with multiple pouches and gear attachments, and a utility belt with additional storage. The worker wears a black helmet with a mounted radio antenna and a full-face gas mask, providing respiratory protection and communication capability. Heavy-duty gloves and boots complete the ensemble, ensuring full coverage and protection. Patches with insignia are visible on the upper arms, and various equipment such as pouches and a radio are attached to the vest and belt. The overall appearance suggests a specialized urban emergency responder, likely involved in hazardous or tactical operations.
description: A heavily armored emergency worker in a dark blue tactical suit, black vest, helmet, and gas mask, equipped with multiple pouches and communication gear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full tactical vest, gas mask, helmet, and utility belt with pouches clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the gas mask, helmet with antenna, arm patch, and side pouches.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the helmet, vest, and belt, as well as the radio antenna and rear pouches.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the helmet, gas mask profile, arm patch, and side equipment.
attribute_uniform_type: A dark blue tactical suit made of heavy-duty synthetic fabric, reinforced at joints, with a black ballistic vest, utility belt, and matching gloves and boots. The uniform includes a full-face gas mask and a black helmet with a mounted radio antenna. Patches are present on the upper arms, and the overall style is consistent with urban tactical or hazardous response teams.
attribute_badge_or_insignia: rectangular patch with 'M' on upper arms, red and white on dark background
attribute_helmet_or_headgear: Black tactical helmet made of hard composite material, featuring a mounted radio antenna and integrated with a full-face gas mask. No visible insignia or lights.
